sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59712" key="krai/arxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρα-ίαρχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59712.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συμποσίαρχος</ref></xr>, dub. in Dumont-Homolle <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Mélanges d'arch. etd' épigr.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.457</biblScope> </bibl> (Thrace, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κρατηριακος</itype> lapis).</sense> </entryFree>
